name: hetu-luoshu-skills
description: HeTu LuoShu — install the Yi Jing's dialectical (yin-yang), systemic (eight trigrams), and dynamic (change) reasoning framework into AI. A thinking discipline, not divination. A gift to the world's open-source community.

plugins.name: hetu-luoshu
plugins.description: HeTu LuoShu — teach AI to reason in yin-yang, trigrams, and change instead of flat linear verdicts. 叩兩端·执两用中.
